meaning: n.[生]自身免疫(法) 自身免疫作用
examples: This machine used CNC as its controlling system which realized the autoimmunization of whole process (feeding, position and welding).
The invention leads the steel chain rivets production to realize autoimmunization, improves the productivity effect and reduces the working intensity.
This article introduces a method of infrared fault alarm and control autoimmunization. It has a lot of functions including magnetism-head detection, probe detection, cha...
